title: Design class boundaries for main.py refactor
summary: Define class-based structure and responsibilities for splitting main.py without behavior changes.
acceptance_criteria: Proposed classes cover main.py responsibilities with minimal overlap.
Notes explicitly preserve current tool behavior and schemas.
tasks: Audit main.py responsibilities and identify cohesive modules.
Document migration steps and risk areas.
notes: Avoid any change to external tool behavior.
Keep the proposal minimal and incremental.
